codeReview.summary: Fix correctly addresses the non-streaming error handling bug identified in chat-completions-streaming. The condition changed from `if (code !== 0 && !stdout)` to `if (code !== 0)`, ensuring non-zero exit codes are always treated as errors regardless of stdout content. Added a clarifying comment. Verification completed with build, typecheck, and tests.

summary: The fix-chat-error-handling feature correctly addresses the blocking issue from the original chat-completions-streaming review. The bug at line ~407 (originally ~355 after the original 42-line addition) where `if (code !== 0 && !stdout)` silently ignored non-zero exit codes with partial stdout is now fixed. The worker changed the condition to `if (code !== 0)` with a comment explaining that non-zero exit always indicates an error. The fix was verified with `bun run build`, `npx tsc --noEmit`, and `bun test` (499 tests passed). The worker followed procedure correctly per skillFeedback. No additional issues found.
